block_00: 3 trading opportunities you don’t want to miss
block_01: PepsiCo is one of the companies to report quarterly earnings this week. Rated ‘Sell’ by Zacks it is probably not the best long-term investment. But who said you cannot capitalize on its price fluctuations in the short-run?
block_03: Earnings reports constitute a perfect opportunity to trade.What are the other 2 companies to post their earnings this week?
